title: archive endpoint massaging
body:
A series of commits to improve the archive endpoint and laying further groundwork for `remote cp`:
* pkg/copy: introduce a Copier
* archive: move stat-header handling into copy package
* pkg/copy: add parsing API

@jwhonce PTAL ... I figured to commit early to make your live easier
